title.zh: 第 8 章（LLDPDU 与 TLV 格式）

blocks.en: The Link Layer Discovery Protocol (LLDP) lets a device announce "who I am and which port you are reaching me on" to its directly-attached neighbours. Everything it announces travels inside one Link Layer Discovery Protocol Data Unit (LLDPDU). Clause 8 is the rulebook for exactly how that data unit is laid out on the wire. The genius of the design is that the whole payload is just a sequence of self-describing chunks called TLVs — Type, Length, Value — so a receiver can always walk the message even if it does not understand every chunk.
blocks.zh: 链路层发现协议（LLDP，Link Layer Discovery Protocol）让设备向直接相连的邻居宣告"我是谁、你通过哪个端口连到我"。它宣告的全部内容都装在一个链路层发现协议数据单元（LLDPDU，Link Layer Discovery Protocol Data Unit）里。第 8 章正是规定这个数据单元在线路上如何排布的规则手册。设计的精妙之处在于：整个负载只是一串自描述的小块，称为 TLV（Type 类型、Length 长度、Value 值），因此即使接收方读不懂每一块，也总能逐块解析整条消息。

blocks.en: Clause 8.1 fixes the ordering conventions so every implementation reads bits the same way. Octets are numbered from 1, increasing in the order they enter the LLDPDU; within an octet, bit 1 is the low-order bit and bit 8 the high-order bit. When several bits form a number, the higher bit number is more significant; when several octets form a number, the lower octet number is more significant (big-endian on the wire). In diagrams, the lowest octet sits leftmost and, inside an octet, bit 8 is drawn on the left. All TLVs obey these rules — so once you know them, you can decode anything in the standard.
blocks.zh: 第 8.1 节固定了排序约定，使每个实现都以相同方式读取比特。八位组（octet）从 1 开始编号，按其进入 LLDPDU 的顺序递增；在一个八位组内，第 1 位是低位，第 8 位是高位。当若干位组成一个数时，位号越高越高位；当若干八位组组成一个数时，八位组编号越低越高位（线路上采用大端序）。在示意图中，编号最低的八位组画在最左侧，而在一个八位组内第 8 位画在左边。所有 TLV 都遵守这些规则——所以一旦掌握，你就能解码标准中的任何内容。

blocks.en: Clause 8.2 defines the shape of the LLDPDU itself: three mandatory TLVs must come first, in this fixed order — Chassis ID, Port ID, Time To Live (TTL) — followed by any number of optional TLVs in any order, and optionally an End Of LLDPDU TLV as the very last chunk. The first two answer "which box, which port?" and together form the Media Service Access Point (MSAP) identifier that uniquely names this link endpoint; the TTL says how long the neighbour should trust the information. The maximum LLDPDU length is whatever the underlying MAC allows — for IEEE 802.3 (Ethernet) that is the 1500-octet basic untagged data field.
blocks.zh: 第 8.2 节定义了 LLDPDU 本身的形状：三个强制 TLV 必须排在最前，且顺序固定——机箱 ID（Chassis ID）、端口 ID（Port ID）、生存时间（TTL，Time To Live）——其后是任意数量、任意顺序的可选 TLV，最后可选地放一个 LLDPDU 结束 TLV（End Of LLDPDU）。前两个回答"哪台设备、哪个端口"，二者合起来构成媒体服务接入点（MSAP，Media Service Access Point）标识符，唯一标识这条链路端点；TTL 则说明邻居应在多久内信任这些信息。LLDPDU 的最大长度取决于底层 MAC——对 IEEE 802.3（以太网）而言即 1500 字节的基本无标签数据字段。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 120" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="10" y="40" width="110" height="40"/><rect x="120" y="40" width="95" height="40"/><rect x="215" y="40" width="120" height="40"/><rect x="335" y="40" width="190" height="40" stroke-dasharray="5 4"/><rect x="525" y="40" width="150" height="40" stroke-dasharray="5 4"/><text x="65" y="64" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">Chassis ID</text><text x="167" y="64" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">Port ID</text><text x="275" y="64" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">Time To Live</text><text x="430" y="64" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">Optional TLVs (any order)</text><text x="600" y="64" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">End Of LLDPDU</text><text x="180" y="24" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11">mandatory, fixed order</text><text x="560" y="24" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11">optional</text><text x="275" y="104" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">Chassis ID + Port ID = MSAP identifier</text></svg>

caption.en: Figure 8-1 shape: three mandatory TLVs in fixed order, then optional TLVs, then an optional End Of LLDPDU TLV.
caption.zh: 图 8-1 的形状：三个强制 TLV 按固定顺序，随后是可选 TLV，最后是可选的 LLDPDU 结束 TLV。

blocks.en: Clause 8.3 sorts every TLV into two families. The basic management set is the small group of TLVs that all LLDP implementations must understand; each is identified by its own unique TLV type value (0–8). The second family is the Organizationally Specific extensions, used by standards bodies (IEEE 802.1, IEEE 802.3, IETF) and vendors to add media- or protocol-specific information; these all share the single type value 127 and are then distinguished by an organizationally unique identifier (OUI) plus a subtype. Clause 8.4 nails down the basic field layout common to both families; 8.5 defines each basic management TLV; 8.6 defines the organizationally specific format.
blocks.zh: 第 8.3 节把每个 TLV 归入两大家族。基本管理集（basic management set）是所有 LLDP 实现都必须理解的一小组 TLV，每个由各自唯一的 TLV 类型值（0–8）标识。第二个家族是组织特定（Organizationally Specific）扩展，由标准组织（IEEE 802.1、IEEE 802.3、IETF）和厂商用来添加与介质或协议相关的信息；它们共用单一类型值 127，再通过组织唯一标识符（OUI，Organizationally Unique Identifier）加上子类型来区分。第 8.4 节确定了两个家族共用的基本字段布局；8.5 节定义每个基本管理 TLV；8.6 节定义组织特定格式。

blocks.en: Clause 8.4 is the heart of the whole encoding. Every TLV starts with a 16-bit header: the TLV type field is the seven most-significant bits of octet 1 (8.4.1), and the TLV information string length is a 9-bit field whose most-significant bit is the least-significant bit of octet 1, continuing into octet 2 (8.4.2). The length counts the information string in octets. The information string itself (8.4.3) may be fixed or variable length, may carry binary or alpha-numeric data, and may itself bundle sub-fields with their own subtype identifiers and length designators. Rules to remember: in binary bit-maps bit 1 is the least-significant bit; the first octet of an alpha-numeric field is most-significant; and alpha-numeric text is always encoded in UTF-8 (IETF RFC 3629).
blocks.zh: 第 8.4 节是整个编码的核心。每个 TLV 都以一个 16 位头部开始：TLV 类型字段是第 1 个八位组的高 7 位（8.4.1），TLV 信息串长度是一个 9 位字段，其最高位是第 1 个八位组的最低位，并延续到第 2 个八位组（8.4.2）。该长度以八位组为单位计量信息串。信息串本身（8.4.3）可以是定长或变长，可承载二进制或字母数字数据，还可在内部捆绑带有各自子类型标识符和长度指示符的子字段。需记住的规则：在二进制位图中第 1 位是最低位；字母数字字段的第一个八位组是最高位；字母数字文本始终用 UTF-8（IETF RFC 3629）编码。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 640 150" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="20" y="50" width="175" height="45"/><rect x="195" y="50" width="225" height="45"/><rect x="420" y="50" width="200" height="45"/><text x="107" y="70" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">TLV type</text><text x="107" y="86" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">7 bits</text><text x="307" y="70" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">info string length</text><text x="307" y="86" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">9 bits</text><text x="520" y="70" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">information string</text><text x="520" y="86" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">0 to 511 octets</text><text x="217" y="38" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">octet 1</text><text x="310" y="38" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">octet 2</text><line x1="217" y1="45" x2="217" y2="100" stroke-dasharray="3 3"/><text x="320" y="130" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Type | Length | Value — the universal 16-bit TLV header (Figure 8-2)</text></svg>

caption.en: Figure 8-2: the basic TLV header. Seven type bits + nine length bits pack into octets 1-2, then the value follows.
caption.zh: 图 8-2：基本 TLV 头部。7 个类型位 + 9 个长度位打包进第 1–2 个八位组，随后是值字段。

blocks.en: Clause 8.5 then walks the basic management set one TLV at a time. 8.5.1 End Of LLDPDU is a 2-octet all-zero TLV that marks where the real TLVs stop — handy because some MACs pad short frames, and this TLV stops those pad octets being mis-read as another TLV. 8.5.2 Chassis ID (mandatory, always first) names the chassis; a chassis ID subtype (Table 8-2: chassis component, interface alias, MAC address, network address, locally assigned, and more) says how to read the ID, and the value must be non-null because it feeds the MSAP. 8.5.3 Port ID (mandatory, always second) names the port the same way via a port ID subtype (Table 8-3). 8.5.4 Time To Live (mandatory, always third) holds an integer of 0 to 65535 seconds: non-zero means "replace everything you know about this MSAP with this", while zero means "delete it now" — the graceful-shutdown signal.
blocks.zh: 第 8.5 节随后逐个讲解基本管理集。8.5.1 LLDPDU 结束是一个 2 字节全零 TLV，标记真正的 TLV 序列在哪里结束——很实用，因为某些 MAC 会给短帧填充，这个 TLV 可防止那些填充字节被误读为另一个 TLV。8.5.2 机箱 ID（强制，永远第一）命名机箱；机箱 ID 子类型（表 8-2：机箱组件、接口别名、MAC 地址、网络地址、本地分配等）说明如何读取该 ID，且其值必须非空，因为它要参与构成 MSAP。8.5.3 端口 ID（强制，永远第二）以同样方式通过端口 ID 子类型（表 8-3）命名端口。8.5.4 生存时间（强制，永远第三）保存一个 0 到 65535 秒的整数：非零表示"用这条信息替换你关于该 MSAP 所知的一切"，零表示"立即删除"——即优雅关闭信号。

blocks.en: The remaining basic TLVs are optional, human-friendly descriptors. 8.5.5 Port Description carries an alpha-numeric port description (the ifDescr object if IETF RFC 2863 is supported). 8.5.6 System Name advertises the system's administratively assigned name (ideally its fully qualified domain name; sysName under IETF RFC 3418). 8.5.7 System Description gives a textual description — hardware type, operating system, networking software (sysDescr under RFC 3418). Each of these three "should not" appear more than once per LLDPDU. 8.5.8 System Capabilities carries two bit-maps from Table 8-4 (Repeater, MAC Bridge, 802.11 Access Point, Router, Telephone, and so on): the system capabilities field lists what the device can do, the enabled capabilities field lists what is currently turned on — and if a bit is enabled but not present in capabilities, the TLV is an error and is discarded.
blocks.zh: 其余基本 TLV 都是可选的、便于人类阅读的描述符。8.5.5 端口描述携带字母数字的端口描述（若支持 IETF RFC 2863 则用 ifDescr 对象）。8.5.6 系统名称宣告系统由管理员分配的名称（最好是其完全限定域名；RFC 3418 下的 sysName）。8.5.7 系统描述给出文字描述——硬件类型、操作系统、网络软件（RFC 3418 下的 sysDescr）。这三者每条 LLDPDU 中"不应"出现多于一次。8.5.8 系统能力携带来自表 8-4 的两个位图（中继器、MAC 桥、802.11 接入点、路由器、电话等）：系统能力字段列出设备能做什么，已启用能力字段列出当前开启了什么——若某位已启用却未在能力字段中出现，则该 TLV 为错误并被丢弃。

blocks.en: 8.5.9 Management Address is the richest basic TLV: it advertises an address (typically a layer-3 address such as an IPv4 address, or the MAC address as a fallback) that network management can use to reach higher-layer entities. It packs a management address string length, a management address subtype (the IANA address-family number), the address itself (max 31 octets), an interface numbering subtype (unknown / ifIndex / system port number) with its interface number, and an optional object identifier (OID) with its own length. A well-formed TLV satisfies: TLV information string length = (management address string length) + (OID string length) + 7; if that arithmetic does not hold, the LLDPDU is rejected. At least one Management Address TLV should appear in every LLDPDU, and multiple distinct ones are allowed.
blocks.zh: 8.5.9 管理地址是最丰富的基本 TLV：它宣告一个地址（通常是三层地址，如 IPv4 地址，或作为后备的 MAC 地址），供网络管理用来到达更高层实体。它打包了管理地址串长度、管理地址子类型（IANA 地址族编号）、地址本身（最多 31 字节）、接口编号子类型（未知 / ifIndex / 系统端口号）及其接口号，以及一个可选的对象标识符（OID，Object Identifier）及其长度。格式正确的 TLV 满足：TLV 信息串长度 =（管理地址串长度）+（OID 串长度）+ 7；若此算式不成立，该 LLDPDU 被拒绝。每条 LLDPDU 中应至少包含一个管理地址 TLV，且允许包含多个互不相同的管理地址 TLV。

blocks.en: Reading tip: a receiver never needs to know what a TLV means to skip it. It reads the 7 type bits, reads the 9 length bits, then jumps that many octets to the next TLV. That single trick is why optional, vendor, and future TLVs can be added forever without breaking old parsers — and why a zero type with zero length (End Of LLDPDU) cleanly terminates the walk.
blocks.zh: 阅读技巧：接收方无需知道某个 TLV 的含义即可跳过它。它读取 7 个类型位，读取 9 个长度位，然后跳过相应数量的八位组到达下一个 TLV。正是这一招，使得可选、厂商、未来的 TLV 可以永远添加而不破坏旧解析器——也使得类型为零、长度为零的 LLDPDU 结束 TLV 能够干净地终止解析。

blocks.en: Finally, Clause 8.6 covers the extensibility hatch — Organizationally Specific TLVs. The information they carry is a one-way advertisement, must be independent of anything received from a remote port, must not be concatenated across TLVs to smuggle oversized messages, and must not be forwarded to other ports. They must conform to 8.4 and to 8.6.1. Annex D of IEEE 802.1Q and Clause 79 of IEEE 802.3 are the worked examples to copy. 8.6.1 gives the format: type value is always 127 (8.6.1.1), then the standard info-string length (8.6.1.2), then a 3-octet OUI naming the organization (8.6.1.3), an organizationally defined subtype (8.6.1.4), and finally the organizationally defined information string (8.6.1.5). 8.6.2 adds the usage-rule expectation: any organization defining its own TLVs should document how many may appear in an LLDPDU, how to tell two TLVs with the same OUI and subtype apart, and what error conditions exist and how a receiver handles each.
blocks.zh: 最后，第 8.6 节涵盖可扩展性出口——组织特定 TLV。它们携带的信息是单向通告，必须独立于从远端端口收到的任何信息，不得跨 TLV 拼接以夹带超大消息，也不得转发到其他端口。它们必须符合 8.4 与 8.6.1。IEEE 802.1Q 的附录 D 和 IEEE 802.3 的第 79 章是可供照搬的范例。8.6.1 给出格式：类型值始终为 127（8.6.1.1），随后是标准的信息串长度（8.6.1.2），再是命名组织的 3 字节 OUI（8.6.1.3）、组织定义子类型（8.6.1.4），最后是组织定义信息串（8.6.1.5）。8.6.2 补充了使用规则的期望：任何定义自有 TLV 的组织都应记录一条 LLDPDU 中可出现多少个、如何区分 OUI 与子类型相同的两个 TLV、存在哪些错误条件以及接收方如何处理各条件。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD A[LLDPDU bytes] --> B[Read 7-bit type] B --> C{type == 127?} C -- no --> D[Basic management TLV
8.5: Chassis/Port/TTL/...] C -- yes --> E[Org-specific TLV 8.6
read OUI + subtype] D --> F[Read 9-bit length, skip to next] E --> F F --> G{type 0 length 0?} G -- yes --> H[End Of LLDPDU: stop] G -- no --> B
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD A[LLDPDU 字节流] --> B[读取 7 位类型] B --> C{类型 == 127?} C -- 否 --> D[基本管理 TLV
8.5: 机箱/端口/TTL/...] C -- 是 --> E[组织特定 TLV 8.6
读取 OUI + 子类型] D --> F[读取 9 位长度, 跳到下一个] E --> F F --> G{类型 0 长度 0?} G -- 是 --> H[LLDPDU 结束: 停止] G -- 否 --> B

summary.en: Coverage map — every Clause 8 unit and its exact home
summary.zh: 覆盖地图——第 8 章每个单元及其确切归处

blocks.en: Ordering & container: 8.1 LLDPDU bit/octet ordering (octet 1 first, bit 1 = low bit, big-endian across octets; diagram conventions). 8.2 LLDPDU format (Chassis ID + Port ID + TTL mandatory in that order, then optional TLVs, then optional End Of LLDPDU; max length = MAC data field, e.g. 1500 octets on 802.3). 8.3 TLV categories (basic management set with unique type values vs Organizationally Specific extensions under type 127 + OUI + subtype). Basic TLV format: 8.4.1 TLV type (7 bits, mandatory vs optional classes, Table 8-1 type values 0-8 plus 127). 8.4.2 TLV information string length (length of the value in octets). 8.4.3 TLV information string (fixed/variable, binary or UTF-8 alpha-numeric, may nest subtyped sub-fields). Basic management set (8.5): 8.5.1 End Of LLDPDU (2-octet all-zero terminator). 8.5.2 Chassis ID (mandatory first; subtype Table 8-2; non-null; feeds MSAP). 8.5.3 Port ID (mandatory second; subtype Table 8-3; non-null). 8.5.4 Time To Live (mandatory third; 0-65535 s; non-zero = refresh, zero = delete). 8.5.5 Port Description (optional; alpha-numeric; ifDescr). 8.5.6 System Name (optional; sysName / FQDN). 8.5.7 System Description (optional; sysDescr). 8.5.8 System Capabilities (two bit-maps from Table 8-4: capabilities + enabled; mismatch => discard). 8.5.9 Management Address (address + subtype + interface number + optional OID; length = addr-str-len + OID-str-len + 7). Organizationally Specific (8.6): 8.6.1 Basic format (type 127, length, 3-octet OUI, org subtype, org info string). 8.6.2 Usage rules (each defining org documents count, disambiguation, and error handling).
blocks.zh: 排序与容器：8.1 LLDPDU 比特/八位组排序（八位组 1 在先，第 1 位为低位，跨八位组大端序；示意图约定）。8.2 LLDPDU 格式（机箱 ID + 端口 ID + TTL 按此顺序强制，随后可选 TLV，再可选 LLDPDU 结束；最大长度 = MAC 数据字段，如 802.3 上 1500 字节）。8.3 TLV 类别（带唯一类型值的基本管理集 对比 类型 127 + OUI + 子类型下的组织特定扩展）。基本 TLV 格式：8.4.1 TLV 类型（7 位，强制与可选两类，表 8-1 类型值 0-8 加 127）。8.4.2 TLV 信息串长度（值的八位组长度）。8.4.3 TLV 信息串（定长/变长，二进制或 UTF-8 字母数字，可嵌套带子类型的子字段）。基本管理集（8.5）：8.5.1 LLDPDU 结束（2 字节全零终止符）。8.5.2 机箱 ID（强制第一；子类型表 8-2；非空；参与 MSAP）。8.5.3 端口 ID（强制第二；子类型表 8-3；非空）。8.5.4 生存时间（强制第三；0-65535 秒；非零 = 刷新，零 = 删除）。8.5.5 端口描述（可选；字母数字；ifDescr）。8.5.6 系统名称（可选；sysName / 完全限定域名）。8.5.7 系统描述（可选；sysDescr）。8.5.8 系统能力（表 8-4 的两个位图：能力 + 已启用；不一致 => 丢弃）。8.5.9 管理地址（地址 + 子类型 + 接口号 + 可选 OID；长度 = 地址串长 + OID 串长 + 7）。组织特定（8.6）：8.6.1 基本格式（类型 127、长度、3 字节 OUI、组织子类型、组织信息串）。8.6.2 使用规则（每个定义组织记录数量、消歧与错误处理）。

cites.note: 8.1 ordering conventions, 8.2 LLDPDU format (Figure 8-1), 8.3 TLV categories, 8.4 basic TLV format with 8.4.1-8.4.3 and Table 8-1 type values.
8.5 basic management set: 8.5.1 End Of LLDPDU through 8.5.9 Management Address, including Tables 8-2/8-3/8-4.
8.6 Organizationally Specific TLVs: 8.6.1 basic format (type 127, OUI, subtype) and 8.6.2 usage rules.
